name: cgpt
title: cgpt
summary: GPT manipulation tool with support for Chromium OS extensions
description:
GPT manipulation tool with support for Chromium OS extensions
Cgpt is a tool to manipulate GUID Partition Table from command line. It also
supports Chromium OS extensions enabling you to change priority for kernel
partitions.

commands.name: cgpt
commands.description: Utility to manipulate GPT partitions with Chromium OS extensions

arguments.description: For more detailed usage, use cgpt COMMAND -h
arguments.raw: -h  For more detailed usage, use cgpt COMMAND -h

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use cgpt because GPT manipulation tool with support for Chromium OS extensions.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use cgpt as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `cgpt COMMAND [OPTIONS] DRIVE` as documented upstream for cgpt.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `cgpt show /dev/mmcblk0` as documented upstream for cgpt.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `cgpt create /dev/mmcblk0` as documented upstream for cgpt.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `cgpt add -i 2 -S 1 -T 15 -P 15 /dev/mmcblk0` as documented upstream for cgpt.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair cgpt with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `cgpt --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

arguments.name: -h
arguments.description: For more detailed usage, use cgpt COMMAND -h

documentation.readme: cgpt - Utility to manipulate GPT partitions with Chromium OS extensions
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install vboot-utils. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cgpt show /dev/mmcblk0`. Further invocations from upstream: `cgpt create /dev/mmcblk0`; `cgpt add -i 2 -S 1 -T 15 -P 15 /dev/mmcblk0`. GPT manipulation tool with support for Chromium OS extensions.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: GPT manipulation tool with support for Chromium OS extensions.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: cgpt - Utility to manipulate GPT partitions with Chromium OS extensions.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install vboot-utils
Install with: sudo apt install vboot-utils
